description: Deed of acknowledgment (iqrār). In Arabic script. Made by Q[...] b. Mūsā al-[...], "one of the captains of the victorious fleets" (aḥad quwwād al-asāṭīl al-manṣūra). It seems that he owes 9 dinars to Mūsā b. Abū l-Faraj. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
